close_reason: Superseded by turnkey-1b2 (Implement pydeps-gen tool) with more detailed subtasks
description:
CLI tool to generate python-deps.toml from Python dependency files.

Similar to godeps-gen but for Python:
- Parse pyproject.toml, requirements.txt, or poetry.lock
- Prefetch packages from PyPI
- Output python-deps.toml with Nix hashes

Usage: pydeps-gen [--requirements requirements.txt] > python-deps.toml
title: pydeps-gen: Generate python-deps.toml from requirements
